rationale: No qualitative change for Poland this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved, Ukraine war continues at background level, no new energy price shocks or border escalation.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: The Iran deal stalemate continues with no breakthrough, keeping mild energy price uncertainty alive for Poland. No structural relief for gas/oil prices confirmed.

top_events.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks, three killed
top_events.summary: War continues at its established background level with no qualitative escalation. For Poland, this remains a persistent but unchanged security backdrop on the eastern flank.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher suspected of spying
top_events.summary: US-China tensions tick slightly upward, with indirect implications for global trade and EU economic stability. Impact on Polish daily life remains distant and marginal.
